# familio_settlement_persons (Data Source)

All persons (catalog-sourced and user-created) linked to a familio.org settlement, via the public /api/v2/persons endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `settlement` (String) The familio.org settlement UUID to list persons for.

### Optional

- `catalog_key` (String) Optional client-side filter: keep only persons whose catalogKey equals this value (familio has no server-side catalog facet). Omit to return all persons for the settlement.

### Read-Only

- `persons` (Attributes List) The persons linked to the settlement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--persons))

<a id="nestedatt--persons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `persons`

Read-Only:

- `birth_date` (String)
- `birth_settlement_text` (String)
- `catalog_key` (String)
- `catalog_name` (String)
- `death_date` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `has_death_event` (Boolean)
- `short_display_name` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
